name: Sanathan Astro Services
author: Sanathan App
description: Cached Predictions, Kundali, Personal Guruji AI with RAG (Qdrant + AIP), FCM push notifications, and AI Tools bulk import with Gemini image generation for the Sanathan Astrology platform.
changelog:
1.5.5

  • New: /guruji/ and /kundali/ WordPress pages auto-created on plugin activation (no manual setup required).
  • New: [sas_guruji_page] shortcode — full-width Guruji landing page with avatar, feature chips, and state-aware CTA (setup/continue/guest).
  • New: Guruji chat modal auto-opens when navigating to /guruji/ (sasConfig.isGurujiPage).
  • New: Admin notice with

link if required pages are deleted.
  • Fix: Pending guard removed from sas-guruji-float.js history load (redundant children.length check).

    • 1.5.4

    • Redesign: Hindu Calendar changed from 324 isolated monthly posts to 27 complete year flipbooks (3 countries × 9 languages). Each book has a cover + 12 monthly pages in a single post.
    • Improvement: Calendar generated in ONE Gemini call per book (vs 12 calls before) — 27 total API calls instead of 324, faster generation and lower cost.
    • Update: Admin Content Engine → Calendar card now shows 0/27 Calendar Books. Total counter updated to 0/297 (27+180+90).
    • Update: Each monthly calendar page contains: all festivals + vrats with dates, Purnima/Amavasya/Ekadashi lunar dates, Shubh Muhurat advice, and a monthly Devanagari mantra with translation.
    • Update: Calendar URL slugs simplified to hindu-calendar-{year}-{country}-{lang} (no month in slug).

    1.5.3

    • New: Phase 4 SEO Content Engine — generates 594 Hindu blog posts in 9 languages (English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Kannada, Malayalam, Bengali, Spanish, French).
    • New: Hindu Calendar 2026 — 324 posts (12 months × 3 countries × 9 langs) with festivals, Ekadashi, Purnima, Amavasya, Muhurat, and monthly Sloka. Country-specific timezones for India, UK, and USA.
    • New: Pooja Guides — 180 posts (20 poojas × 9 langs) with Samagri list, step-by-step instructions, Sanskrit mantras + meanings, and Aarti.
    • New: Sloka Collections — 90 posts (10 deities × 9 langs) with 12 slokas each — Devanagari, IAST transliteration, meaning, and benefit per sloka.
    • New: Interactive FlipBook display — StPageFlip.js (MIT, bundled) renders all content as beautiful page-turn books on both desktop and mobile.
    • New: WhatsApp + Facebook + Copy Link share buttons on all content posts.
    • New: Open Graph / Twitter Card meta tags auto-injected on content posts for social previews.
    • New: Gemini Imagen 4.0 Fast featured images generated per post.
    • New: Admin → Content Engine page — 3-tab UI (Calendar / Pooja / Slokas) with batch generation, progress bars, live counters, and duplicate-safe re-runs.
    • New: WordPress category hierarchy — Hindu Calendar > India/UK/USA, Pooja Guides, Slokas & Mantras (auto-created via Setup Categories).

    1.5.2

    • New: Multi-country payments — auto-detects visitor country via Cloudflare CF-IPCountry header (or ipapi.co fallback). India → INR, UK/Ireland → GBP, all others → USD.
    • New: [sas_pricing_table] now renders correct currency symbol and prices per visitor country.
    • New: PMPro checkout auto-overrides billing_amount and currency for GBP/USD visitors (no paid PMPro add-on required).
    • New: Admin Settings → International Pricing section — 8 configurable price fields (4 USD + 4 GBP).
    • New: Trust bar on pricing table shows dynamic currency code (INR/USD/GBP).

    1.5.1

    • New: Membership plans — Paid Memberships Pro integration with 3 tiers (Seeker/Free, Sadhak/Core, Guru/Full) mapping to existing SAS_TIER_* constants.
    • New: [sas_pricing_table] shortcode — beautiful responsive 3-column pricing table with monthly/annual toggle, INR pricing, features checklist, and Stripe checkout links.
    • New: Stripe payment gateway support (test mode) via Paid Memberships Pro.
    • New: Paid members (Core/Full) get unlimited Kundali birth detail edits — free tier retains 1 free edit.
    • Update: GET /user/tier now checks PMPro membership levels first, falls back to kundali table tier.

    1.5.0

    • New: Kundali birth profile flow — [sas_kundali_form] shortcode with 3 states (guest/setup/view+edit). Collects Full Name, DOB, TOB, Place of Birth with geocoding autocomplete.
    • New: One free edit policy — users can update birth details once for free; further edits show Premium upgrade notice (sas_birth_edits user meta).
    • New: REST endpoints — GET+PUT /kundali/birth-profile (authenticated), GET /util/location-search (public, proxies VedicAstro geo-search).
    • New: Guruji AI now shows structured birth profile header (Name, Born, Zodiac, Moon Sign, Ascendant) in every chat session system prompt.
    • New: Guruji nudges users without Kundali to visit /kundali/ instead of giving generic advice.

    1.4.9

    • Fix: Directorist single-category page now shows real category name (e.g. "Ayurveda & Healing") in hero banner, breadcrumb, and browser tab — was showing generic "Single Category" page title.

    1.4.8

    • New: Beautiful home page with logged-in/out states — hero, features grid, Hindu Tools preview, Events preview, Dharma Services preview, CTA section. PHP shortcodes assembled via Elementor.

    1.4.7

    • 1.4.7 — Updated AI Tools archive hero to Dharmic language (Dharma Sahayaks).

    1.4.6

    • New: AI Tools Setup — Step 5 "Cleanup Titles" button strips " (Imported)" suffix from all AI Tool post titles and URL slugs.

    1.4.5

    • Fix: Inject socialv-breadcrumb hide rule via wp_add_inline_style() to bypass Hostinger LiteSpeed CSS file cache — hero now shows without duplicate theme banner.

    1.4.4

    • Fix: Hide theme's socialv-breadcrumb banner on AI Tools pages (single + archive) — our hero provides its own breadcrumb.

    1.4.3

    • Fix: Single page — use get_post_field(raw) instead of get_the_content() to bypass Elementor filter that was replacing post_content with its own rendered HTML.

    1.4.2

    • Fix: Single AI Tool page — guide content (How-to-Use HTML) now renders correctly; was double-escaped as HTML entities in stored post_content.

    1.4.1

    • Fix: Enable CPT archive for ai-toolai_tool via register_post_type_args filter — /ai-tools/ archive URL now works correctly.

    1.4.0

    • New: AI Tools Archive page — beautiful responsive grid with hero banner, live search, and category filter tabs.
    • New: AI Tools Single page — featured image hero, breadcrumb navigation, styled AIP form box, and formatted How-to-Use guide.
    • New: Sidebar on single page with related tools and category browser.
    • New: SAS_AI_Tools_Frontend class — template override, taxonomy registration, asset enqueuing.
    • New: public/css/ai-tools.css and public/js/ai-tools.js — fully self-contained frontend styles and search/filter JS.

    1.3.4

    • Fix: Gemini Imagen model updated from imagen-3.0-generate-001 to imagen-4.0-fast-generate-001 — featured image generation now works correctly.

    1.3.3

    • Fix: AI Tool CPT slug reverted to ai-toolai_tool — all import, update, and image generation steps now target the correct post type that the theme registers.

    1.3.2

    • Fix: AI Forms post type corrected to wpaicg_form (AI Puffer plugin) — import now finds all 104 forms.

    1.3.1

    • Fix: AI Tools import now correctly detects AIKit forms (changed post type from wpaicg_form to aipkit_form).
    • Fix: Corrected AI Tool CPT slug from ai-toolai_tool to ai_tool — import and all setup steps now work.

    1.3.0

    • AI Tools Setup: new admin page with 4 one-click operations.
    • Setup Categories: creates 7 canonical ai_tool_category terms (Vedic Astrology, Bhakti & Devotion, Mantra & Prayer, Hindu Scriptures, Spiritual Life, Vaastu & Remedies, Festivals & Rituals).
    • Import AI Tool Posts: bulk-imports AIP forms as ai_tool CPT posts, auto-detects category + tags, skips non-Sanathan forms.
    • Update Existing Posts: assigns categories/tags + Gemini SEO guide to the 13 existing posts.
    • Generate Featured Images: calls Gemini Imagen 3 API to create spiritual illustrations, uploads to Media Library, sets as featured image.
    • Gemini SEO Content: each AI Tool post gets a Gemini Flash-generated "How to Use" guide (intro, numbered steps, results, tips) for SEO.
    • Settings: added Gemini API key field.

    1.2.0

    • RAG Knowledge Base: Qdrant integration for semantic search over 43 Vedic astrology documents.
    • New Qdrant client (class-sas-qdrant.php) — direct REST API to Qdrant Cloud or self-hosted.
    • AIP embedding support — get_embedding() fetches 1536-dim vectors via AIP plugin.
    • Knowledge Base (class-sas-knowledge.php) — 43 documents: 12 zodiacs, 9 planets, 10 houses, 5 doshas, 6 remedies, 8 concepts.
    • Guruji chat() now searches Qdrant before calling AIP — grounded, accurate answers.
    • New admin page: Knowledge Base — index content and monitor Qdrant collections.
    • Settings: Qdrant URL + API key fields with live connection test.

    1.1.0

    • Phase 2: Personal Guruji AI — per-user profiles, avatars, multilingual replies, AIP model selection.

    1.0.0

    • Initial release: Predictions cache, Kundali storage, REST API, Admin UI.
